load-verify-pdf-using-pdffileinfo.title: Load and Verify PDF Using PdfFileInfo Facade
load-verify-pdf-using-pdffileinfo.description: Shows how to load a PDF with the PdfFileInfo facade, retrieve the Document, and confirm it contains at least one page.

toggle-pdf-encryption-based-on-state.title: Toggle PDF Encryption Based on Current State
toggle-pdf-encryption-based-on-state.description: The example checks if a PDF is encrypted using PdfFileInfo.IsEncrypted, then either decrypts it with the owner password or encrypts it with user and owner passwords, demonstrating conditional security handling.

decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password
decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.description: Shows how to remove encryption from a PDF by providing the owner password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.DecryptFile.

encrypt-pdf-256-aes.title: Encrypt PDF with 256‑bit AES and passwords
encrypt-pdf-256-aes.description: Shows how to encrypt an existing PDF using 256‑bit AES, providing user and owner passwords and setting a document privilege with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-40.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-rc4-40.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt an existing PDF with a user password using the RC4‑40 algorithm via Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-custom-privileges.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Custom Privileges
encrypt-pdf-aes256-custom-privileges.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 while applying specific document privileges in a single operation with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

change-pdf-user-password.title: Change PDF User Password While Preserving Encryption
change-pdf-user-password.description: Shows how to change the user password of an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, keeping the existing encryption settings unchanged.

update-owner-password-of-protected-pdf.title: Update Owner Password of a Protected PDF
update-owner-password-of-protected-pdf.description: Shows how to change the owner password of an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf without modifying the existing user password or permissions.

change-pdf-user-owner-passwords.title: Change PDF User and Owner Passwords
change-pdf-user-owner-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to change both the user and owner passwords of an existing PDF file in a single call using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

set-pdf-privileges-allow-print-disallow-.title: Set PDF Privileges to Allow Printing and Disallow Copying
set-pdf-privileges-allow-print-disallow-.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to enable printing while disabling copying in a PDF and saving the modified file.

set-pdf-privileges-enable-form-filling-d.title: Set PDF Privileges: Enable Form Filling, Disable Assembly
set-pdf-privileges-enable-form-filling-d.description: Demonstrates how to apply document privileges to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, enabling form filling while disabling document assembly.

disable-copy-enable-print-pdf.title: Disable Copying While Enabling High-Resolution Printing for PDF
disable-copy-enable-print-pdf.description: Shows how to forbid copying and allow high‑resolution printing on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-usage-rights-from-signed-pdf.title: Remove Extended Usage Rights from Signed PDF
remove-usage-rights-from-signed-pdf.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, detect extended usage rights, remove them with PdfFileSignature.RemoveUsageRights, and save the resulting file.

check-pdf-extended-usage-rights.title: Check PDF for Extended Usage Rights
check-pdf-extended-usage-rights.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade to determine if a PDF contains extended usage rights.

remove-verify-usage-rights-pdf.title: Remove and Verify Usage Rights in PDF
remove-verify-usage-rights-pdf.description: Loads a PDF file, removes its usage rights, checks whether any usage rights remain, and saves the modified document.

encrypt-pdf-with-password.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Capture Exceptions
encrypt-pdf-with-password.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using PdfFileSecurity, enable AllowExceptions to capture errors, and log detailed exception information.

apply-print-privilege-disable-exceptions.title: Apply Print Privilege to PDF and Disable Internal Exceptions
apply-print-privilege-disable-exceptions.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity to set a print privilege on a PDF while turning off internal exception handling so that runtime exceptions are propagated.

encrypt-pdf-save-to-memorystream.title: Encrypt PDF and Save to MemoryStream
encrypt-pdf-save-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and writing the encrypted document into a MemoryStream for network transmission.

encrypt-pdf-from-byte-array.title: Encrypt PDF from Byte Array
encrypt-pdf-from-byte-array.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, applying AES‑256 encryption with optional passwords, and returning the encrypted PDF as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-password-only.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only
encrypt-pdf-with-user-password-only.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting only a user password, letting the library generate a random owner password and applying 256‑bit AES encryption.

apply-password-protection-to-pdf.title: Apply Password Protection to an Existing PDF
apply-password-protection-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, encrypt it with user and owner passwords using 256‑bit AES, and save the protected document without recreating it.

retrieve-pdf-encryption-algorithm.title: Retrieve PDF Encryption Algorithm
retrieve-pdf-encryption-algorithm.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using the Facades API and read its CryptoAlgorithm property to determine the encryption algorithm, if any.

validate-and-decrypt-encrypted-pdf.title: Validate and Decrypt Encrypted PDF
validate-and-decrypt-encrypted-pdf.description: The example checks if a PDF is encrypted using PdfFileInfo; if it is, it decrypts the file with the owner password via PdfFileSecurity, otherwise it simply copies the original file.

batch-encrypt-pdfs.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with User and Owner Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, applying the same user and owner passwords and a 256‑bit AES encryption.

batch-decrypt-pdfs-owner-password.title: Batch Decrypt PDFs Using Owner Passwords
batch-decrypt-pdfs-owner-password.description: Demonstrates how to read a configuration file and decrypt multiple password‑protected PDF files in batch using the owner password with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

change-pdf-user-password-bulk.title: Change PDF User Password in Bulk
change-pdf-user-password-bulk.description: Iterates through a folder of PDF files and applies a standardized user password to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-owner-passwords-multiple-pdfs.title: Update Owner Passwords of Multiple PDFs
update-owner-passwords-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to change the owner password of several PDF files while preserving their existing user passwords, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

encrypt-pdf-based-on-filename.title: Encrypt PDFs Based on File Name
encrypt-pdf-based-on-filename.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades by selecting the CryptoAlgorithm and key size from naming conventions, then saving the encrypted output.

pdf-encryption-usage-report.title: Generate PDF Encryption Usage Report
pdf-encryption-usage-report.description: Scans a directory of PDF files, uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to determine if each PDF is encrypted, and writes a text report showing the encryption status and algorithm information.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-privileges.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑128 and Enable Print/Edit Privileges
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-privileges.description: Demonstrates how to combine print and edit privileges for a PDF and encrypt the document using RC4‑128 with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

decrypt-modify-save-pdf.title: Decrypt, Modify, and Save PDF with Aspose.Pdf
decrypt-modify-save-pdf.description: Shows how to open a PDF, decrypt it if it is password‑protected using PdfFileSecurity, add a text fragment to the first page, and save the modified document.

encrypt-decrypt-pdf-verify.title: Encrypt and Decrypt PDF with Verification
encrypt-decrypt-pdf-verify.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using user and owner passwords with 256‑bit AES, then decrypting it and confirming round‑trip integrity by comparing the original and decrypted file sizes.

encrypt-pdf-and-measure-performance.title: Encrypt PDF Files and Log Execution Time
encrypt-pdf-and-measure-performance.description: The example loads each PDF, encrypts it with user and owner passwords using AES‑256, saves the encrypted file, and logs the time taken for the encryption operation.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-azure-blob.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Upload to Azure Blob
encrypt-pdf-aes256-azure-blob.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity with AES‑256 and uploading the encrypted stream to Azure Blob Storage.

decrypt-pdf-owner-password-azure-key-vau.title: Decrypt PDF Using Owner Password from Azure Key Vault
decrypt-pdf-owner-password-azure-key-vau.description: Demonstrates retrieving an owner password stored in Azure Key Vault and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to decrypt a protected PDF file.

monitor-folder-encrypt-pdfs-archive.title: Monitor Folder and Encrypt PDFs to Secure Archive
monitor-folder-encrypt-pdfs-archive.description: Demonstrates how to watch a directory for new PDF files, encrypt them with user/owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf, and move the encrypted files to a secure archive folder.

change-pdf-passwords-from-csv.title: Change User and Owner Passwords for PDFs from CSV
change-pdf-passwords-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file containing PDF paths and passwords, then use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity to change both user and owner passwords and save the secured PDFs.

encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF provided as a stream using RC4‑40 encryption with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade, returning the encrypted PDF in a MemoryStream.

generate-pdf-encryption-summary.title: Generate Encryption Summary for PDF Files
generate-pdf-encryption-summary.description: Iterates over a set of PDF documents, determines whether each file is encrypted, captures the (unknown) encryption algorithm, extracts document privilege settings, and writes the information to a CSV summary file.

test-decryption-fails-incorrect-owner-pa.title: Test Decryption Fails with Incorrect Owner Password
test-decryption-fails-incorrect-owner-pa.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, then verify that decryption throws an InvalidPasswordException when an incorrect owner password is supplied, using a unit test.
